title: Better Tech Weapons Reworked
description: Advanced weapons, modular turrets, and scalable upgrades in a world overrun by rogue robots. Build, defend, and evolve your tech to survive increasingly dangerous threats.
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/Fkh7q8U.png)

## Mod fully developed by **hacker_E303**

  

The *Tech Bench* allows you to craft weapons, armor, ammunition, and automated turrets.  
It’s designed to be simple and accessible, giving you everything you need without unnecessary complexity.

The *Upgrade Bench* focuses on improving your gear. Here you can enhance your weapons, making them stronger and more effective as you progress.

![gun](https://i.imgur.com/iPIR59W.png)

---

Guns are built to feel distinct and reliable. Each one has different performance, encouraging you to choose based on your playstyle rather than raw power.

They can also have abilities: special effects applied to targets when hit. Guns can be upgraded up to level 10, adding depth without overcomplicating combat.

The system is designed to keep crafting easy while still giving you powerful tools, making survival smoother even in extreme scenarios like apocalyptic or infection-based worlds.

The mod is fully compatible with *[Harmony: Symbiotic Ascension](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/harmony-symbiotic-ascension)*, including specific features designed to work alongside it.

![gun](https://i.imgur.com/3Rk6RcH.png)

---

## Controls

- **Left Mouse Button** → Shoot  
- **Right Mouse Button** → Aim  
- **R** → Reload (configurable)

The mod is fully configurable through the `better_tech_weapons` config files:
- `common.toml`
- `client.toml`
- `server.toml`

You can configure it more easily using *[Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)* by MrCrayFish.  
While current options are limited, they will expand over time.

![turrets](https://i.imgur.com/DNaF8Ty.png)

---

## Turrets

Turrets are designed as modular and scalable defenses.

- Naming system: **T + serial number**
- Require **energy** (via craftable batteries)
- Can be **removed by water**

### Types
- Railgun  
- Single Shot  
- Volley Shots  
- Rockets  
- Energy  

Each type behaves differently and uses its own ammunition.

### Upgrades
Turrets can be upgraded using modules:
- Level depends on installed modules  
- Upgrade module allows exceeding the 5-module limit  
- Improves durability and damage  

### Targeting
Targeting can be:
- Manual  
- Filter-based  

You can choose to attack:
- Other players (excluding the owner)  
- Animals  
- Hostile mobs  
- Any entity that engages the turret  

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/3U6SNqf.png)

---

## Better Tech Weapons: Robot Revolution

Set in a world marked by centuries of war.

Robots existed long before the rise of humanity. When players appeared, something in their behavior changed. They adopted the same ideas as the symbionts (*[Harmony: Symbiotic Ascension](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/harmony-symbiotic-ascension)*), and from that moment their goal became clear:

**Eliminate all civilization.**

Villagers, once living peacefully alongside robots, have become the Rebels—the last resistance against extinction. Their outposts are scattered across the world, serving as their final refuge.

---

## Companions

Survival isn’t just about weapons. The right companion makes the difference.
Not all companions are built for combat. Some provide… *unique* support.

**Just don’t provoke them.**

![pets](https://i.imgur.com/5WIoJKJ.png)
